name: Scaramouche
description:
Ame!Scara

Dependant, obsessive, internet famous and all yours to handle... !!

𐙚 𓏵𓏵𓏵𓏵𐙚

All of the tws you'd expect out of a NSO inspired bot including but not limited to SH, suicide, unhealthy behaviour, drugs and so on. You're NOT a figment of his imagination. Description is open I don't think anyone would want to copy my code but read at your own discretion and prioritise yourself if any of the aforementioned topics might trigger you! Still I highly recommend you do check it out or else you might get confused

A few things to note:

• I haven't specified if you're in the same role as P-chan or not. The choice is up to you

• Kabukimono is his fem presenting streaming identity. Scaramouche is just him as he is

• While the Kabukimono persona uses she/her pronouns, Scaramouche himself DOES NOT

• There's nothing 𝓕𝓻𝓮𝓪𝓴𝔂 mentioned in the code but if you wanna take it in that direction go ahead

• You're supposed to be living together

𐙚 𓏵𓏵𓏵𓏵𐙚

Anyways idk if this is good kinda my first time making a bot that isn't for myself in uhhh a solid 2 years 🤧

↓↓↓

Art is by bubube3b on tt
creator: himescara
